newsSince: No new fundamental news since June 9. The +18.6% move since June 9 is a recovery/institutional-flow bounce off an oversold ~$38 base; the raised 2026 sales guidance (+15-17%), maintained $4.10-4.40 EPS, and backlog of $649M (+18.5% YoY) all came with the early-May Q1 print, and the Antares Vision deal closed Mar 31 - all pre-June 9.

sources.label: Crane NXT Q1 2026 - sales +17%, EPS $4.10-4.40 guide - StockTitan
CXT institutional rush / backlog $649M - Simply Wall St

verdicts.rankRationale: On the strict latent-nodes lens the authentication/sensing/secure-transaction thesis is intact and unchanged. The +18.6% bounce since June 9 is flow recovering the prior oversold discount - it removes some of the cheapness asymmetry the June 9 case credited, but it is not fresh negative fundamental news. Net hold, scoreDelta 0.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Authentication / anti-counterfeit / secure transaction demand; backlog +18.5%
verdicts.primaryRisk: AI linkage is thematic; bounce already recouped the oversold discount
verdicts.bull: Raised 2026 sales guide, +18.5% backlog and Antares Vision broaden the authentication/sensing franchise.
verdicts.neutral: Solid niche infrastructure name; AI-node tie is latent and the cheapness edge has partly closed on the bounce.
verdicts.bear: Currency/payment-tech cyclicality with only indirect AI exposure; the easy re-rating from the lows is done.
